entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY THIS EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 60
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
